+        "title": "Review valkey configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant valkey configuration:\nAs part of the per-slot dictionary effort, we implemented all of the needed changes so that we could efficiently unlink and free the data in a single slot with lazyfree. This is useful in two cases:\n1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature] Implement CLUSTER FLUSHSLOT command",
+        "description": "Add cluster flushslot command. Closes #1133.\n\nSyntax:\n\n    CLUSTER FLUSHSLOT <slot> [ASYNC|SYNC]\n\n## Background\n\nWe want to implement the ability to SYNC or ASYNC free all data from a single slot. This is useful in two cases:\n\n1. When a primary loses ownership of a slot, it will temporarily freeze while it synchronously frees the slot.\n2. When doing resharding, you may prefer to forcibly delete all the data from a slot and assign it to another node.\n\n## Internal changes\n\nModify the function\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",

Closes #1133.\n\nSyntax:\n\n    CLUSTER FLUSHSLOT <slot> [ASYNC|SYNC]\n\n## Background\n\nWe want to implement the ability to SYNC or ASYNC free all data from a single slot. This is useful in two cases:\n\n1. When a primary loses ownership of a slot, it will temporarily freeze while it synchronously frees the slot.\n2.",
